title: Intense Korean Cheese Jeon
description: A comforting, cheese‑pull Korean pancake with a herbal kick, perfect for a protein‑rich dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper until combined.
Add water, egg, and sesame oil, whisking until a smooth batter forms.
Fold in shredded cheddar, chopped kimchi, and sliced scallions.
Heat a heavy skillet over medium-high heat and lightly brush with sesame oil.
Pour a ladleful of batter into the skillet, spreading into a round pancake about 5cm thick.
Cook for 3–4 minutes until the edges lift and the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the jeon and cook the other side for 2–3 minutes.
While the second side is cooking, preheat the broiler and place the remaining jeon on a broiler‑safe tray.
Broil for 2 minutes or until the cheese on top melts and starts to brown, creating a pull.
Remove from broiler, let cool for a minute, then cut into wedges and serve hot.
